parameters.command:
set -e

echo "N8N_HEALTH_START"
if curl -fsS http://localhost:5678/healthz >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "n8n_health=ok"
else
  if curl -fsS http://localhost:5678/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "n8n_health=ok"
  else
    echo "n8n_health=fail"
  fi
fi

echo "DOCKER_STATUS_START"
docker ps --format '{{.Names}}|{{.Image}}|{{.Status}}'

echo "N8N_IMAGE_START"
docker inspect n8n --format '{{.Config.Image}}|{{.Image}}' 2>/dev/null || true

echo "WATCHTOWER_CONTAINER_START"
docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}|{{.Image}}|{{.Status}}' | grep '^watchtower|' || true

echo "WATCHTOWER_LOGS_START"
docker logs --since 36h watchtower 2>&1 | tail -n 120 || true

echo "UNATTENDED_START"
systemctl is-active unattended-upgrades || true

echo "REBOOT_START"
if [ -f /var/run/reboot-required ]; then
  echo "yes"
else
  echo "no"
fi

echo "UPGRADABLE_START"
apt list --upgradable 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | head -n 25 || true

echo "LOGS_START"
docker logs --since 24h n8n 2>&1 | tail -n 120 || true
